name: Cosmic Disco
short_description: Feel the beat! A VR rhythm shooter where you kill enemies in beat, as they fly towards you, alternating pistols hand to hand, surrounded by beautiful skies with musical visualization. Created by a solo developer.
detailed_description:
Feel the beat! A VR rhythm-shooter where you kill enemies in beat, as they fly towards you, alternating pistols hand to hand, surrounded by beautiful skies which breathe with music! Created by a solo developer.

  • Shoot rhythmically in beat to win!

  • Beautiful skies which breathe with music! (Musical visualization)

  • Different Modes: Alternating pistols hand to hand, Only one pistol, No laser pointer, Aim assist (Easier hitboxes) etc.

  • Electronic Music Soundtrack by "Monowoman", "uap" and others!

  • Solo-developed by an author who was inspired by "Hotline Miami" and "My Friend Pedro" and wanted to recreate some of these feelings in VR

  • Join the Discord or Steam Forum to make suggestions and improve the game :)

supported_languages: English, French, Italian, German, Spanish - Spain, Arabic, Simplified Chinese, Korean, Polish, Portuguese - Portugal, Russian, Turkish, Ukrainian, Japanese, Portuguese - Brazil, Traditional Chinese
